evidence: Real libprotobuf ASan build reproduced unchecked GzipInputStream::BackUp(count) semantics. Run output: first_size=20, backup_count=52, byte_count_after_backup=72, second_size=52, pointer_delta=32, byte_count_after_second_next=20, with no AddressSanitizer report. The compiled library returned a pointer 32 bytes before the original buffer and an inflated size, confirming a logic bug but not library-internal memory corruption.
